ascii_query(3) Library Functions Manual ascii_query(3)

NAME

ascii_query

SYNOPSIS

Namespaces


namespace json

Data Structures


struct HttpRequest
Parsed HTTP request. struct HttpResponse
HTTP response builder. class HttpServer
Simple single-threaded HTTP server. struct ThreadInfo
Thread information. struct FrameInfo
Stack frame information. struct VariableInfo
Variable information (from LLDB SBValue). struct BreakpointInfo
Breakpoint information. class LLDBController
LLDB process controller.

Typedefs


using RouteHandler = std::function<HttpResponse(const HttpRequest &)>
Route handler function type.

Enumerations


enum class ProcessState { Invalid, Running, Stopped, Exited, Crashed, Detached }
Process state enumeration.

Typedef Documentation

using ascii_query::RouteHandler = std::function<HttpResponse(const HttpRequest &)>

Route handler function type.

Definition at line 157 of file http_server.h.

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum class ascii_query::ProcessState [strong]

Process state enumeration.

Enumerator

Invalid
No valid process attached.
Running
Process is running normally.
Stopped
Process is stopped (breakpoint, signal, etc.).
Exited
Process has exited.
Crashed
Process crashed.
Detached
Detached from process.

Definition at line 35 of file lldb_controller.h.

35                         {
36   Invalid,  
37   Running,  
38   Stopped,  
39   Exited,   
40   Crashed,  
41   Detached, 
42 };
